name: Hiday Hidaka Corp.
summary: Hiday Hidaka Corp. operates a chain of restaurants in Japan. The company offers ramen and other Chinese dishes. It operates approximately 400 stores primarily in the Tokyo metropolitan area. The company was formerly known as Hidaka Commercial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hiday Hidaka Corp. in June 1998. Hiday Hidaka Corp. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Saitama, Japan.
